length_only.description: Prompt word count only, StandardScaler + LR

syllogism.note: below-chance anti-prediction, syllogism conflict/control are surface-matched

note: All three text baselines cluster 0.82-0.86; activation probe achieves 0.999. Length-only is competitive with richer encoders because base_rate (d=+3.69) and conjunction (d=+6.36) have large length differences. Syllogism (d=+0.02) produces below-chance AUC for all text baselines.
